query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a bright blue jacket and dark pants is seen upside down, suspended by their feet from a metal apparatus attached to the ceiling. The subject appears to be in motion, hanging in an indoor environment with a plain, neutral-toned floor or wall in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred figure wearing a bright blue jacket and dark pants hangs upside down from a metal ceiling apparatus by their feet, the entire scene streaked with horizontal blur that smears the subject and background into flowing bands of color and tone, giving the image a dynamic, disorienting energy.
